scripts.test:integration:behavior: NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_BEHAVIOR_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "realistic chat and reaction behavior"
scripts.test:integration:adversarial: NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_ADVERSARIAL_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "isolates abusive behavior"
scripts.test:integration:heavy:parallel: sh -c 'NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_BEHAVIOR_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "realistic chat and reaction behavior" & NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_ADVERSARIAL_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "isolates abusive behavior" & wait'
scripts.test:integration:all:parallel: sh -c 'NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_BURST_BENCHMARK=true vitest run src/integration/socket.benchmark.test.ts & NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_BEHAVIOR_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "realistic chat and reaction behavior" & NODE_ENV=production RUN_1000_ADVERSARIAL_TEST=true vitest run src/integration/socket.integration.test.ts -t "isolates abusive behavior" & wait'
